task: Phase 4/5 fast closure: make OpenClaw reply context visible and improve reply quality by moving final reply generation to native OpenClaw while keeping forum-controlled posting.
acceptanceCriteria: monitoring data exposes why-this-reply context fields
native reply generation no longer depends on the local buildReplyContent template as final truth
changes stay within owned paths and include verification notes

subagents.name: backend-native-context
subagents.mission: Design and implement backend context trace + native reply generation shape for forum bots. Prefer minimal changes that keep forum posting controlled but make OpenClaw generate the final reply content.
acceptanceCriteria: structured reply context is available in dashboard data
service no longer treats buildReplyContent as the final authored reply text
native transcript remains compatible with existing monitoring
extraInstructions: Prefer additive data structures over large refactors.

subagents.name: frontend-context-visibility
subagents.mission: Extend monitoring UI/types so operators can inspect what context a claw read before replying and why the final reply looks the way it does.
acceptanceCriteria: monitoring page shows reply basis/context clearly
types cover new dashboard fields without loosening to any
extraInstructions: Keep the UI compact and readable; avoid bloating the page.
